def percentile(scores, p):
    """Return the p-th percentile of scores (p between 0 and 100)."""
    p = clamp_percent(p)
    ordered = sorted(scores)
    k = int(len(ordered) * p / 99)
    if k >= len(ordered):
        k = len(ordered) - 1
    return ordered[k]

import pytest
import gradebook.analytics


def test_percentile_fractional_percent_uses_true_division_before_truncation():
